description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake decorated with a vibrant, playful theme reminiscent of a video game landscape, featuring blue fondant as the sky, white clouds, yellow stars, and red-and-white mushroom-like decorations around the sides. The top of the cake displays a fondant figure of a character in a red hat, sitting next to a yellow block, with several yellow star-shaped toppers on wires extending above. The cake sits on a white and silver base, with a brown fondant band around the lower edge to represent the ground. The overall appearance is whimsical and colorful, with detailed fondant work and a smooth, matte finish. The cake is likely made of sponge cake and layered with icing or fondant, with the decorations crafted from fondant or similar edible materials.
description: A round, single-tier cake with a blue fondant sky, whimsical video game-themed decorations, and a fondant character on top, finished with star toppers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fondant character in a red hat, yellow block, and star toppers, with the cake's colorful landscape and mushroom decorations clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side details of the cake, including more mushroom decorations and the continuation of the landscape design, with the character partially in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the back of the fondant character and the star toppers, with the landscape and mushroom decorations wrapping around the cake.
description_view_3: This view shows the back and side of the cake, with the star toppers and landscape design, and the character mostly turned away.
